title: Vince from Chumba Bikes Presents His Sendero Steel Edition
content:
Grab a coffee and take a deep dive into Vince’s bikepacking kit on his Sendero Steel MTB.

Vince from Chumba made this video as a resource for riders looking to compare their bikepacking kits or get ideas for building their own.

If you contact Chumba, you can collaborate with Vince to plan out your own custom Sendero mountain bike, Dispersed Bikepacking bag set, and many essential accessories.

The post Vince from Chumba Bikes Presents His Sendero Steel Edition appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
